Skip to main content Surface for Business All Surface Pro 2-in-1s for Business All Surface Laptops for Business Surface Studio 2+ Surface Hub 3 All Accessories Compare Surface devices Device Management Microsoft Security Surface for Business Essentials Microsoft Warranty and Protection Plans Surface Compliance For home WHERE TO BUY Microsoft Security Azure Dynamics 365 Microsoft 365 Microsoft Teams Windows 365 Microsoft AI Azure Space Mixed reality Microsoft HoloLens Microsoft Viva Quantum computing Sustainability Education Automotive Financial services Government Healthcare Manufacturing Retail Find a partner Become a partner Partner Network Microsoft Marketplace Software companies Blog Microsoft Advertising Developer Center Documentation Events Licensing Microsoft Learn Microsoft Research View Sitemap

Compare Surface for Business laptops, tablets, and computers

There’s a Surface device that’s a perfect match for every person on your team. Use the Surface comparison tool to compare up to three Microsoft Surface models side by side, including processors, graphics, screen size, resolution, weight, RAM, and more. Device features and availability may vary by market.

Compare Surface for Business laptops, tablets, and computers

There’s a Surface device that’s a perfect match for every person on your team. Use the Surface comparison tool to compare up to three Microsoft Surface models side by side, including processors, graphics, screen size, resolution, weight, RAM, and more. Device features and availability may vary by market.

Frequently asked questions

|

  • Compared to a standard laptop, the Surface Pro provides a full PC experience in a lighter, more portable form. With a 13-inch or 12-inch display and tablet-to-laptop flexibility, it gives you the processing power of a laptop with the convenience of a tablet, all in one device. It also boasts built-in AI experiences, a lasting battery, and advanced security.

  • The difference between a Surface Laptop for Business vs. Surface Pro for Business lies in their design. Surface Laptop for Business models feature a traditional “clamshell” appearance, whereas Surface Pro for Business models are 2-in-1 detachable tablets designed for flexibility.

  • Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel and Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel are two of our most sustainable devices yet, thanks to their all-day battery life, recycled materials, energy efficiency, and repairability. 

    All Surface for Business devices are made with recycled materials, packaged using recycled materials, designed to be repairable, and built with energy efficiency in mind.

  • When choosing a Surface for Business laptop or computer for remote work, look for models that feature built-in AI performance features to promote smoother workflows and enterprise-grade security to help keep endpoints secure. Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel, Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel, and Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel offer long lasting battery life, enterprise-grade security, and built in AI workflows to keep remote teams productive and protected.

  • Many Surface for Business devices, including Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel, Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel, and Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel, are designed using rugged materials such as aluminum alloys and recycled rare earth metals while maintaining a lightweight form factor. This durable construction helps extend device lifespan, supporting long term sustainability goals.

  • Surface for Business devices with AI-powered features help employees work more efficiently while maintaining enterprise-grade security and manageability. Built-in AI capabilities support smoother workflows, improved performance for modern workloads, and consistent productivity, making it easier for organizations to scale, manage, and secure devices across hybrid and remote teams.

Compare Surface computers for your business

The Surface for Business portfolio of computers delivers experiences people love with the choice and flexibility they need in order to work on their terms.

Where to buy Surface computers

Microsoft authorized Surface resellers can help you buy, deploy, and manage Surface for your business.
Find a reseller


Still looking for the right Surface computers for your people?

Start over to compare other Surface computers.
Start over
  • [1] System software and updates use significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1 GB = 1 billion bytes. See Surface.com/Storage for more details.
  • [2] This device does not contain user serviceable parts. Hard drive is only removable by an authorized technician following Microsoft provided instructions.
  • [3] Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance for details.
  • [4] Keycap labels can fit on the keys on the Surface Go Type Cover and Surface Laptop Go but will require a more precise application due to the key size.
  • [5] Sold separately. Charger for Surface Slim Pen sold separately. Surface Slim Pen can charge with Surface Slim Pen Charger, Surface Pro Signature Keyboard, Surface Pro X Signature Keyboard, Surface Laptop Studio, and Surface Duo 2 Pen Cover.
  • [6] Requires license or subscription (sold separately) to activate and use.
  • [7] Activation required. If your device is managed by your organization’s IT department, contact your IT administrator for activation. After one month trial, you will be charged the applicable monthly or annual subscription fee. Credit card required. Cancel any time to stop future charges. See https://aka.ms/m365businesstrialinfo.
  • [8] Weight not including Surface Pro Signature Keyboard and Surface Slim Pen 2 (sold separately).
  • [9] Requires Dolby Vision® encoded content and video.
  • [10] Voice Clarity requires Windows 11 and is available in apps which use integrated device microphones and use certain Windows audio processing modes.
  • [11] Recommended for 13.8-inch.
  • [12] Sold also as a bundle with Slim Pen.
  • [15] Microsoft’s Limited Warranty is in addition to your consumer law rights.
  • [16] HDR requires HDR content and enabling HDR in device settings.
  • [17] Customer Replaceable Units (CRUs) are components available for purchase through your Surface Commercial Authorized Device Reseller. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risk and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans. Availability of replaceable components and service options may vary by market and/or at initial product launch.
  • [18] 5G not available in all areas, mmWave in US only. Supports Sub-6 GHz, not available in all areas; compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing. Wi-Fi 6E not available in all areas.
  • [19] Validated 30% post-consumer recycled plastics based on Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2. First Edition, Dated April 06, 2023.
  • [20] Actual rating Nominal (WH) 40.98 and Min (WH) 39.7.
  • [21] Might vary depending on manufacturing processes.
  • [22] Solid State Drive (SSD) Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the SSD is marketed as removable per the Technical Specifications. Solid State Drive (SSD) Retention is included in both Extended Hardware Service Plus and Microsoft Complete for Business Plus and is also available as an Optional Add-on when purchasing Microsoft Extended Hardware Service and Microsoft Complete for Business. Devices returned to Microsoft with a missing Solid State Drive (SSD) are subject to a Solid State Drive (SSD) replacement fee unless the device is enrolled in the Drive (SSD) Retention offer.
  • [23] Voice Focus requires activation, Windows 11 and is available in apps which use integrated device microphones and use certain Windows audio processing modes.
  • [24] Requires Dolby® Atmos® encoded content/audio.
  • [25] Sold separately. Software license required for some features.
  • [26] Colors available on selected models only. Available colors, sizes, finishes, and processors may vary by store, market, and configuration.
  • [27] Surface Pro Keyboard with optional Bold keyset available only in US English.
  • [28] Enclosure includes Bucket and Kickstand. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in Bucket and Kickstand. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure, UL 2809-2, Second Edition, November 7, 2023.
  • [29] Please refer to the EPEAT registry for current ratings. Ratings can vary by country, may change over time, and products are eventually archived.
  • [30] Up to 20 hours of battery life based on local video playback test on Surface Laptop 13.8-inch
    Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2024 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop Snapdragon® X Plus C10 256GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Tested with Windows 11. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.

    Up to 22 hours of battery life based on local video playback test on Surface Laptop 15-inch
    Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2024 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop Snapdragon® X Elite C12 512GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Tested with Windows 11. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [31] Up to 13 hours of battery life based on web browsing test on Surface Laptop 13.8-inch
    Based on web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2024 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop Snapdragon® X Plus C10 256GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing eight popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Tested with Windows 11. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.

    Up to 15 hours of battery life based on based web browsing test on Surface Laptop 15-inch
    Based on web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2024 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop Snapdragon® X Elite C12 512GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing eight popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Tested with Windows 11. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [32] 13.8-inch Surface Laptop comes with 39W Surface power supply. Fast charging (from 5% to 80%) is supported with minimum 65W Surface power supply or USB-C® PD charger, sold separately. Testing was conducted at Microsoft in February 2024, using pre-production devices, software, and minimum of 65W USB-C® charger under controlled conditions. The device was powered on to the desktop screen with default display brightness settings. Actual charge time will vary based on operating conditions. Measured at typical office ambient temperature of 23C.
  • [33] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [34] Requires Windows 11.
  • [35] Enclosure includes A Cover, C Bucket and D Cover. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL 2809-2, Second Edition, November 7, 2023.
  • [36] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See [Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn]. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Unless required by law, device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans.
  • [37] Feature availability varies by market, see aka.ms/WindowsAIFeatures When Copilot for Windows is not available or enabled on the device, pressing the Copilot key will launch Windows Search.
  • [38] 32GB memory and 1T storage option available for Surface Pro with Wi-Fi only.
  • [39] Surface Pro display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13 inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [40] Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings, and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance for details.
    Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2024 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro Snapdragon® X Plus C10 256GB and 512GB, 16GB RAM (LCD) devices and Surface Pro Snapdragon® X Elite C12 1TB 32GB RAM (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Tested with Windows 11. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [41] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2024 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro Snapdragon® X Plus C10 256GB and 512GB, 16GB RAM (LCD) devices and Surface Pro Snapdragon® X Elite C12 1TB 32GB RAM (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing eight popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Tested with Windows 11. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [42] In select markets, only specific configurations come with 39 W Surface power supply. Fast Charging (from 5% to 80%) is supported with minimum 45W Surface power supply or USB-C® PD charger, sold separately. Testing was conducted at Microsoft in February 2024, using pre-production devices, software, and minimum of 45W USB-C® charger under controlled conditions. The device was powered on to the desktop screen with default display brightness settings. Actual charge time will vary based on operating conditions. Measured at typical office ambient temperature of 23C.
  • [43] Pen and keyboard sold separately.
  • [44] Applies to Surface Pro Keyboard with pen storage, Surface Pro Flex, and Surface Pro Signature Keyboard.
  • [45] Surface Pro Flex and Surface Pro Keyboard with Surface Pro Keyboard with Bold Keyset available only in US English.
  • [46] Enclosure includes Bucket and Kickstand. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in Bucket and Kickstand. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure, UL 2809-2, Second Edition, November 7, 2023.
  • [47] NFC is available on Wi-Fi configurations of Surface Pro.
  • [48] MIL-STD 810H establishes a methodology for testing products against environmental stresses under controlled laboratory conditions. Such testing is not a guarantee of future performance under these test conditions. Abuse, like that contained in MIL-STD 810G testing, is not covered under Microsoft’s standard warranty. Learn more at Surface hardware environmental test results.
  • [49] Windows 10 is not available for purchase but is supported by Surface Laptop Go 3. Visit https://aka.ms/SurfaceSupportedOperatingSystems for more information.
  • [50] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [51] For Surface Pro for Business (11th Edition) options with power supply included. For options without a power supply, packaging is UL Validated to contain a minimum of 72% recycled content. Based on Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated November 7, 2023. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [52] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2024 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro Snapdragon® X Plus C10 256GB and 512GB, 16GB RAM (LCD), Wi-Fi+5G devices and Surface Pro Snapdragon® X Elite C12 1TB 32GB RAM (OLED), Wi-Fi+5G devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing eight popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Tested with Windows 11. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [53] Surface Pro with Wi-Fi+5G models only.
  • [54] eSIM support may vary by carrier.
  • [55] Options with 5G coming Fall 2024. Surface Pro 11th Edition Wi-Fi+5G models only. 5G not available in all areas; compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.
  • [56] Weight not including Keyboard.
  • [57] Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance for details.
  • [58] Sold separately.
  • [59] MIL-STD 810H establishes a methodology for testing products against environmental stress conditions under controlled laboratory conditions. These test results are informational only and not a representation, promise or guarantee of future performance under the same conditions in the real world. Customer-induced damage or use beyond normal use conditions, like that contained in MIL-STD 810G testing, is not covered under Microsoft’s Limited Hardware Warranty. Learn more at Surface hardware environmental test results.
  • [60] The Surface Pro, Surface Laptop display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
  • [61] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in January 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro Intel Core Ultra 5 256GB, 16GB RAM (LCD) devices and Intel Core Ultra 7 256GB, 16GB RAM (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [62] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in January 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro Intel Core Ultra 5 256GB, 16GB RAM (LCD) devices and Intel Core Ultra 7 256GB, 16GB RAM (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing eight popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [63] In select markets, only specific configurations come with 39W Surface Power Supply. Fast charging is supported with minimum 65W Surface Power Supply or minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher, sold separately. Testing conducted by Microsoft in December 2024. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and fast charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [64] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [65] Based on FSC certification.
  • [66] Enclosure includes bucket. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024.
  • [67] Please refer to the EPEAT registry for current ratings. Ratings can vary by country, may change over time, and products are eventually archived.
  • [68] Based on web browsing test. Battery life varies significantly based on usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance for details.
  • [69] Up to 20 hours of battery life based on local video playback test on Surface Laptop 13.8-inch
           Up to 22 hours of battery life based on local video playback test on Surface Laptop 15-inch
    Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in January 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop 13.8-inch Intel Core Ultra 5 256GB, 16GB RAM devices and Surface Laptop 15-inch Intel Core Ultra 7 256GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [70] Up to 12 hours of battery life based on web browsing test on Surface Laptop 13.8-inch
           Up to 14 hours of battery life based on web browsing test on Surface Laptop 15-inch
    Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in January 2025 using preproduction software and Surface Laptop 13.8-inch Intel Core Ultra 5 256GB, 16GB RAM devices and Surface Laptop 15-inch Intel Core Ultra 7 256GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing eight popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [71] Integrated smart card reader available only on Surface Laptop in Black in one of these configurations: 15-inch 5/16/512, 7/16/256, 7/16/512, 7/32/512 and only in US and Canada.
  • [72] Surface Laptop comes with 39W(13.8-inch)/65W(15-inch) Surface Power Supply. Fast charging is supported with minimum 65W Surface power supply or USB Type-C PD charger rated at 60W or higher, sold separately. Testing conducted by Microsoft in December 2024. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and fast charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [73] Requires Dolby Atmos® encoded content and audio.
  • [74] Enclosure includes A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL 2809-2, Second Edition, June 20, 2024.
  • [75] MIL-STD 810H establishes a methodology for testing products against environmental stresses under controlled laboratory conditions. Such testing is not a guarantee of future performance under these test conditions. Abuse, like that contained in MIL-STD 810H testing, is not covered under Microsoft’s standard warranty. Learn more at Surface hardware environmental test results.
  • [76] Computers that have earned the ENERGY STAR label are third-party certified to be energy efficient and use 25% - 40% less than conventional models by using the most efficient components and better managing energy use when idle.
  • [77] MIL-STD 810H establishes a methodology for testing products against environmental stress conditions under controlled laboratory conditions. These test results are informational only and not a representation, promise or guarantee of future performance under the same conditions in the real world. Customer-induced damage or use beyond normal use conditions, like that contained in MIL-STD 810G testing, is not covered under Microsoft’s Limited Hardware Warranty. Learn more at Surface hardware environmental test results.
  • [78] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and app usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface.com/Storage for more details.
  • [79] Surface Pro display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 12 inches diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [80] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core) 256GB, 16GB RAM 1st Edition devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [81] Based on web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core) 256GB, 16GB RAM 1st Edition devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing eight popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [82] Voice focus requires activation, requires Windows 11 and is available in apps which use integrated device microphones and use certain Windows audio processing modes.
  • [83] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface 45W USB-C Wall Charger. Fast charging is supported with minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher (sold separately). Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and Fast charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [84] Activation required. If your device is managed by your organization’s IT department, contact your IT administrator for activation. After 30 days, you will be charged the applicable monthly or annual subscription fee. Credit card required. Cancel any time to stop future charges. See https://aka.ms/m365businesstrialinfo.
  • [85] Enclosure includes bucket, kickstand, and pen tray. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024.
  • [86] The Surface Pro display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
  • [87] Excluding PSU. Contains 4.7% recycled cobalt, consisting of 100% recycled cobalt in the battery cell. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [88] Applies to sales packaging. Based on internal analysis using IEEE Std 1680.1-2018. IEEE Standard for Environmental and Social Responsibility Assessment of Computers and Displays. 4.7.3.1 Required—Recycled content in wood-based fiber packaging.
  • [89] Sources must be Forest Stewardship Council certified.
  • [90] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See Surface service options - Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Unless required by law, device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans.
  • [91] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface.com/Storage for more details.
  • [92] Flash storage Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the SSD is marketed as removeable per the Technical Specifications. Flash storage Retention is included in both Extended Hardware Service Plus and Microsoft Complete for Business Plus and is also available as an Optional Add-on when purchasing Microsoft Extended Hardware Service and Microsoft Complete for Business. Devices returned to Microsoft with a missing flash storage are subject to a flash storage replacement fee unless the device is enrolled in the flash storage Retention offer.
  • [93] Based on video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core) 256GB, 16GB RAM 1st Edition devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [94] Based on web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop Snapdragon® X Plus (8 Core) 256GB, 16GB RAM 1st Edition devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing twelve popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [95] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface 45W USB-C Wall Charger. Fast charging is supported with minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher (sold separately). Testing conducted by Microsoft in March 2025. For details on Fast Charging see - USB-C® and Fast charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [96] Activation required. If your device is managed by your organization’s IT department, contact your IT administrator for activation. If you activate your trial outside your organization, after 30 days, you will be charged the applicable monthly or annual subscription fee. Credit card required. Cancel any time to stop future charges. See https://aka.ms/m365businesstrialinfo.
  • [97] Excluding PSU. Contains 3.1% recycled content, consisting of 90% recycled stainless in bracket, 100% recycled copper in PCB, 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets and 100% recycled tin in solder. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [98] Excluding PSU. Contains 3.5% recycled cobalt, consisting of 100% recycled cobalt in the battery cell. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [99] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn.

    Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Unless required by law, device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans.
  • [100] Feature availability varies by market, see aka.ms/keysupport.
  • [101] Bold keyset option available only in US English in select markets.
  • [102] Surface Laptop display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [103] When comparing Surface Laptop with Wi-Fi 7 320MHz to models with Wi-Fi 6E 160MHz with compatible Wi-Fi 7 routers. 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [104] Computers that have earned the ENERGY STAR® label are third-party certified to be energy efficient and use 25% - 40% less than conventional models by using the most efficient components and better managing energy use when idle.
  • [105] 5G options coming later in 2025 for select Surface Laptop for Business 13.8-inch configurations and countries/regions; compatibility and performance depends on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.
  • [106] Up to 20 hours of battery life based on local video playback test on Surface Laptop 13.8-inch
             Up to 22 hours of battery life based on local video playback test on Surface Laptop 15-inch
    Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in January 2025 for Wi-Fi only models and in July 2025 for Wi-Fi+5G models using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop 13.8-inch Intel Core Ultra 5 256GB, 16GB RAM devices and Surface Laptop 15-inch Intel Core Ultra 7 256GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network for Wi-Fi only models and cellular was connected to a cellular network for Wi-Fi and 5G models. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [107] Up to 12 hours of battery life based on web browsing test on Surface Laptop 13.8-inch
             Up to 14 hours of battery life based on web browsing test on Surface Laptop 15-inch
    Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in January 2025 for Wi-Fi only models and in July 2025 for Wi-Fi+5G models using preproduction software and Laptop 13.8-inch Intel Core Ultra 5 256GB, 16GB RAM devices and Surface Laptop 15-inch Intel Core Ultra 7 256GB, 16GB RAM devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing eight popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network for Wi-Fi only models and cellular was connected to a cellular network for Wi-Fi and 5G models. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [108] Enclosure includes A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL 2809-2, Second Edition, June 20, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [109] Enclosure includes A Cover, C Bucket, D Cover and SIM Tray. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in A Cover, C Bucket and SIM Tray. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [110] Minimum 1.5% of Surface Winters for Business Wi-Fi (excluding PSU) contains 100% recycled cobalt. Minimum 1.4% of Surface Winters for Business 5G (excluding PSU) contains 100% recycled cobalt. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 20, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [111] The Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
  • [112] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. Surface.com/Storage more details.
  • [113] Drive Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the Drive is marketed as removable in the technical specifications. Devices returned without a drive may incur a replacement fee unless covered by a Drive Retention benefit (sold separately). Available plans and options may vary by device and region. See Surface Warranty, Protection Plans & Support – Microsoft Surface for Business for details.
  • [114] Surface display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13.8-inch or 15-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less). 
  • [115] Optimized for touch interaction only. Pen input and compatibility with Surface Pen, Surface Slim Pen, or similar accessories is not supported.
  • [116] Requires Dolby Vision® encoded content and video.
  • [117] The Surface Laptop for Business display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
  • [118] Available on select 13.8-inch models at additional cost.
  • [119] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8-inch with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 256GB and Surface Laptop for Business, 15-inch with Intel® Core™ Ultra X7 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 256GB devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [120] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8-inch with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 256GB and Surface Laptop for Business, 15-inch with Intel® Core™ Ultra X7 processor (Series 3) 16GB, 256GB devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [121] Requires Dolby Atmos® encoded content/audio.
  • [122] External monitor support requires compatible displays, cables, and accessories. See Surface tested peripherals page for compatibility information.
  • [123] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface Power Supply. Fast charging is supported with minimum 65W Surface Power Supply or minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher, sold separately. Testing conducted by Microsoft in February 2026. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and fast charging for Surface – Microsoft Support.
  • [124] Integrated smart card reader available only on Surface Laptop for Business, 15-inch in Platinum and only in selected markets.
  • [125] Enclosure includes A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled aluminum alloy in A Cover and C Bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, dated June, 2024.
  • [126] Device (excluding power supply), contains a minimum of 1.4 % recycled cobalt, consisting of 100% recycled cobalt in the battery cell. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [130] Copilot key feature availability varies by market, see key Support.
  • [131] Surface Laptop display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [132] The Surface Pro for Business display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
  • [133] Support for two 4K monitors requires compatible displays, cables, and accessories. See tested peripherals page for compatibility information.
  • [134] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface 45W USB-C Wall Charger. Fast charging is supported with minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher (sold separately). Testing conducted by Microsoft in February 2026. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and Fast Charging for Surface – Microsoft Support.
  • [137] Surface display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13-inch diagonally (actual viewable area is less). 
  • [138] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 256GB, (LCD) and Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 512GB (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network for Wi-Fi only models and cellular was connected to a cellular network for Wi-Fi+5G models. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [139] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 256GB, (LCD) and Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 512GB (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing twelve popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network for Wi-Fi only models and cellular was connected to a cellular network for Wi-Fi+5G models. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [140] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface Power Supply. Fast charging is supported with minimum 65W Surface Power Supply or minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher, sold separately. Testing conducted by Microsoft in February, 2026. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and fast charging for Surface – Microsoft Support.
  • [141] Available positioning systems vary by country/region and activate based on device location.
  • [142] Wi-Fi+5G Models only. Support may vary by market and carrier.
  • [143] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.
  • [144] Applies to Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage, Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard, and Surface Pro Signature Keyboard.
  • [145] Bold keyset option available only in US English in select markets.
  • [146] Enclosure includes bucket, kickstand 100% recycled aluminum alloy in bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024.
  • [147] Device (excluding power supply), contains 5.1% recycled cobalt, consisting of 100% recycled cobalt in the battery cell. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [148] Device (excluding power supply), contains [x.x] % recycled copper, consisting of 100% recycled copper on the motherboard. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated [Month, year]. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [149] Device (excluding power supply), contains [x.x] % recycled copper, consisting of 50% recycled copper in the thermal assembly plates. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated [Month, year]. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [150] Drive Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the Drive is marketed as removable in the technical specifications. Devices returned without a drive may incur a replacement fee unless covered by a Drive Retention benefit (sold separately). Available plans and options may vary by device and region. See Surface Warranty, Protection Plans & Support – Microsoft Surface for Business for details.
  • [151] Device (excluding power supply), contains 3.7 % recycled content, consisting of 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets, 100% recycled tin in solder, 50% recycled copper in thermal plate, 100% recycled copper and 100% recycled gold in the motherboard. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024 Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [152] Device (excluding power supply), contains a minimum of 1.7% recycled content, consisting of 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets, 100% recycled tin in solder, 100% recycled copper and 100% recycled gold in the motherboard. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [153] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 256GB devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [154] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor (Series 3), 16GB, 256GB devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing twelve popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-Brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [155] Device (excluding power supply), contains 3.5% recycled content, consisting of 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets, 100% recycled tin in solder, 100% recycled copper and 100% recycled gold in the motherboard. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [156] Device (excluding power supply), contains 3.4 % recycled cobalt, consisting of 100% recycled cobalt in the battery cell. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June, 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [163] Rating is based on EPEAT 1.0. Please refer to the EPEAT registry for current ratings. Ratings can vary by country, may change over time, and products are eventually archived.
